content:
🚀 Hiring: Full Stack Developer (WordPress & PHP)

We are looking for a talented and motivated Full Stack Developer to join our growing team. If you have a passion for creating high-quality websites and web applications, we'd love to hear from you.

Required Skills

✔ Strong hands-on experience in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Bootstrap
✔ Proficiency in PHP and WordPress Development
✔ Experience with WordPress theme and plugin customization
✔ Good understanding of responsive and mobile-friendly design
✔ Ability to write clean, efficient, and maintainable code

Job Details

📍 Location: Sector 63, Noida
💼 Position: Full Stack Developer
💰 Salary: Up to ₹50,000 per month (depending on experience and skills)

Apply Now

📧 Email: career@nimbusitsolutions.com
📞 Contact: 8178279355
